ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Please input the path to where the JSON files are stored, relative from the vault root.
ast.target: 请输入 JSON 文件存储位置的路径，相对于 vault 根目录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How good should the matches be? 0 is a perfect match, the smaller it is, worse matches will be included.
ast.target: 匹配度应该多高？0 表示完美匹配，值越小，包含的匹配项越差。
